# Complete Feature Inventory {.appendix}

## Feature Sets Used

```{python}
#| label: all-features
#| code-fold: false

admin_features = [
    'NACCID', 'VISITMO', 'VISITYR', 'VISITDAY',
    'NACCVNUM', 'NACCNVST', 'INVISITS',
]

cognitive_features = [
    'LOGIMEM', 'MEMUNITS', 'CRAFTDVR', 'CRAFTDRE', 'CRAFTURS', 'CRAFTVRS',
    'TRAILA', 'TRAILB', 'DIGFORCT', 'DIGBACCT', 'DIGBACLS',
    'NACCMMSE', 'MOCATOTS', 'NACCMOCA', 'CDRSUM', 'CDRGLOB',
    'ANIMALS', 'VEG', 'BOSTON', 'MOCAFLUE',
    'MOCARECN', 'DIGFORSL', 'UDSVERTN', 'UDSVERLC', 'UDSVERFC',
    'MOCAREPE', 'MOCASER7', 'MOCAABST',
]

demographic_features = [
    'NACCAGE', 'EDUC', 'SEX',
    'HYPERTEN', 'DIABET', 'HYPERCHO', 'NACCBMI',
]

npi_features = [
    'NACCGDS', 'DEP', 'ANXIET', 'BEAPATHY', 'MEMPROB',
]

genetic_features = [
    'NACCAPOE', 'NACCNE4S',
    'NPATGAM1', 'NPATGAM2', 'NPATGAM3', 'NPATGAM4', 'NPATGAM5', 'NPATGAMY',
    'NPATGFR1', 'NPATGFR2', 'NPATGFR3', 'NPATGFR4', 'NPATGFRN',
    'NPATGSEV', 'NPGENE',
    'OTHMUT', 'OTHMUTX',
    'ADGCEXOM', 'ADGCEXR', 'ADGCRND', 'ADGCGWAS',
    'NPARTAG', 'APP',
]
```

## NACC Variable Descriptions

<!--
Add a reference table mapping variable names to their full descriptions.
Source: NACC Data Dictionary
-->
